entry.title: New: RES25-097 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, LODGING, MEALS AND RELATED EXPENSES VALUED AT APPROXIMATELY $5,000 TO THE CITY FROM THE AMERICAN ASSOCIATION OF MOTOR VEHICLE ADMINISTRATORS FOR TWO REPRESENTATIVES FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY TO ATTEND THE ANNUAL COMMERCIAL DRIVER LICENSE COORDINATORS AND IT MANAGERS MEETING IN ORLANDO, FLORIDA, FROM MAY 6-8, 2025.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
